schemaName.description: Schema name for the module's data model

useDefaultRoutes.description: Whether to generate default CRUD routes

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Add tags by entering one or more words, separated with a comma (,)

tag.description: Tag metadata applied to other objects

authuser.description: Extra user properties related to auth

authType.description: Types of authentication used with this user

userroles.description: Extra user properties for specifying roles

extends.description: The parent role that this role should inherit scopes from

handlers.description: Keys are HTTP methods, values are handler name strings

permissions.description: Keys are HTTP methods, values are permission scope arrays or null for unsecured

meta.description: Keys are HTTP methods, values are OpenAPI operation objects

override.description: When true and a defaults template is in use, merges this route's properties onto the matching default route (by path) instead of adding a duplicate

contentassets.description: Tracks asset IDs referenced by content items

url.title: URL
url.description: If using an external asset, this should be the URL to the asset

createdAt.description: Date that the data was created

updatedAt.description: Date that the data was last modified

coursethemepreset.description: A reusable collection of theme settings

parentTheme.description: Name of the theme these settings should be applied to

level.description: The priority level of the log message

module.description: Module responsible for creating the log

isLocalInstall.description: Whether the plugin has been installed locally (as opposed to with the CLI)

isAddedByDefault.description: Whether the plugin should be added by default for new courses

isTempLocked.description: Whether the user account has been temporarily locked

isPermLocked.description: Whether the user account has been permanently locked

failedLoginAttempts.description: The number of failed login attempts

lastFailedLoginAttempt.description: Timestamp of the last failed login attempt

expiresAt.description: When the preview should be purged from the server

versions.description: Versions of framework and plugins used in the build

post.description:
Route requires no authentication

Can be used with or without authentication. If authenticated, an email/password combination will be acepted. If unauthenticated, a valid reset token and password must be specified.

Route requires no authentication

Generates a password reset and emails this to the user with instructions on updating their password.

ROUTE IS ONLY ACCESSIBLE FROM LOCALHOST.

Route requires no authentication

Only one user can be registered in this way, and if a super user already exists the request will fail.

Required scopes: read:me

get.summary: Get lightweight content tree for a course
get.description:
Required scopes: read:content

Returns a projected subset of fields for all content items in a course, suitable for rendering tree views without fetching full documents. Supports If-Modified-Since for conditional requests — returns 304 if the course has not been modified since the given date.

parameters.name: If-Modified-Since
parameters.description: Return 304 if the course has not been modified since this date

304.description: Course has not been modified since the If-Modified-Since date
